rulings.Case Title: GILBANE BUILDING COMPANY V AIR SYSTEMS ACQUISITION, INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder In The Motion To Dismiss Filed By Defendants Air Systems Acquisition, Inc.; Liberty Mutual Insurance Company And Arthur Williams, Jr (Pursuant To Stipulation)
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 2, 2007, LINE 18. PLAINTIFF SANTA CLARA COUNTY'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE ENTIRE ACTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THERE IS ANY BASIS FOR ESTABLISHING A QUI TAM ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THERE IS NO CREDIBLE EVIDENCE OF ACTUAL KNOWLEDGE OR RECKLESS INDIFFERENCE WITH RESPECT TO DEFENDANTS SEEKING AND OBTAINING A LICENSE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: WINIFRED W HUANG VS. JAY ROTHSTEIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 2, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANTS JAY ROTHSTEIN AND CHINA VENTURE FILMS L.L.C.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MADE A DECISION NOT TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT EVEN THOUGH PLAINTIFF GAVE DEFENDANT A CHANCE TO DO SO. THIS IS A NOT A CASE OF MISTAKE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. LIKE JACKSON V BANK OF AMERICA (1983) 141 CAL. APP. 3D 55, 58, DEFENDANT GAMBLED AND LOST MUST ACCEPT THE CONSEQUENCES. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE PIERI VS. CHRISTOPHER DOLAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 2, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT LENT HOWARD AND CHRISTOPHER DOLAN'S MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATIONS IS SUSTAINED ON EACH OF THE GROUNDS ASSERTED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SHE IS THE RECORD OWNER. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ON INFORMATION AND BELIEF COMPLIES WITH THE REASONABLE INTERPRETATION OF THE REQUIREMENTS OF NOTICE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 37.9 A (F)(5). =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: SYLVIA C LEE VS. RAYMOND MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, APRIL 2, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT RAYMOND MARTIN AND MARY RIVERA'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED A CAUSE OF ACTION, I.E. THE EXISTENCE OF A LANDLORD TENANT RELATIONSHIP, TERMINATION OF TENANCY AND TENANTS HOLDING. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF MAY ENCOUNTER PROBLEMS OF PROOF, THAT IS NOT AN ISSUE FOR DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/PB)
